subcodes.first_line: O friends of God! The mysteries of the divine Book, which from the foundation of the world until now have remained hidden from all eyes, are manifest and evident [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسرار کتاب الهی که از اول بنای عالم الی حین از ابصار مستور ظاهر و هویدا یا اولیاء الله
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
